/* === Variant: chest (510x193, depth 228) === */
/* Generated by BoxForge v1.0 — 6 panes (4 struct, 1 lid, 1 extra) */

.box3d-wrap.chest-variant {
  --chest-w: 510px;
  --chest-h: 193px;
  --box-d: 114px;
  --box-half: -114px;
  --bevel-w: 2px;
  --box-dark: #3d2b08;
  --box-dark2: #1f0d00;
  --box-light: #a87830;
  --box-floor: #1a1206;
  --box-ceil: #5a4020;
  --box-glow: rgba(255,200,80,0.6);
  --perspective: 352px;
  perspective: 352px;
  width: 510px;
  height: 193px;
}
.box3d-wrap.chest-variant .box3d-scene {
  width: 510px; height: 193px;
  transform: rotateX(-28deg) rotateY(-5deg);
}
.box3d-wrap.chest-variant .box3d-spin {
  width: 510px; height: 193px;
}
.chest-variant .box3d-body {
  width: 510px; height: 193px;
}

/* Back (back): 510 x 193 */
.box3d-wrap.chest-variant .bf-back {
  width: 510px; height: 193px;
  background: linear-gradient(to top, #3d2b08, #a87830);
  transform: translateZ(-114px) translate(0px,0px);
}
/* Left (left): 228 x 193 */
.box3d-wrap.chest-variant .bf-left {
  width: 228px; height: 193px;
  left: 141px; top: 0px;
  background: linear-gradient(to top, #3d2b08, #a87830);
  transform: translate(-253px,1px) rotateY(90deg) translateZ(0px);
}
/* Sub-box: depth 4px */
.box3d-wrap.chest-variant .bf-left { transform-style: preserve-3d; }
.box3d-wrap.chest-variant .bf-left > .sub-edge-back {
  position: absolute; pointer-events: none;
  width: 228px; height: 193px;
  background: linear-gradient(to top, #8a5a12, #a87830);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  transform-style: preserve-3d;
  transform: translateZ(-4px) translate(0px,0px);
}

}

}

/* Lid: Lid (510x230, hinge: top, open: 135°, hover: 25°) */
.box3d-wrap.chest-variant .box3d-lid-wrap {
  position: absolute; transform-style: preserve-3d;
  width: 510px; height: 230px;
  left: 0px; top: -18.5px;
  transform: translate(0px,10px) rotateX(90deg) translateZ(96.5px) translateY(0px);
}
.box3d-wrap.chest-variant .box3d-lid {
  width: 510px; height: 230px;
  background: linear-gradient(to top, #3d2b08, #a87830);
  transform-origin: center 0px;
  transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.33, 1, 0.68, 1);
}
.box3d-wrap.chest-variant.hovered .box3d-lid {
  transform: rotateX(25deg);
}
.box3d-wrap.chest-variant.opened .box3d-lid {
  transform: rotateX(135deg);
}
/* Sub-box: depth 12px */
.box3d-wrap.chest-variant .box3d-lid { transform-style: preserve-3d; }
.box3d-wrap.chest-variant .box3d-lid > .sub-edge-back {

/* === EXTRA PANES (1) === */
/* Front (front, 509x190, role: structure) */
.box3d-wrap.chest-variant .bf-front {
  width: 509px; height: 190px;
  left: 0.5px; top: 1.5px;
  transform: translateZ(114px) translate(1px,-1px);
  background: linear-gradient(to top, #3d2b08, #a87830);
}
/* Sub-box: depth 3px */
.box3d-wrap.chest-variant .bf-front { transform-style: preserve-3d; }
.box3d-wrap.chest-variant .bf-front > .sub-edge-back {

}

/* === GLOW SOURCES (5) === */
.chest-glow-0 { /* Floor glow */
  position: absolute;
  width: 714px; height: 270px;
  left: calc(50% - 357px + 0px);
  top: calc(50% - 135px + 107px);
  transform: translateZ(0px) rotateX(90deg) rotateY(0deg);
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(200,80,198,0.6) 0%, transparent 70%);
  filter: blur(18px);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.chest-glow-1 { /* Cross glow 1 */
  position: absolute;
  width: 714px; height: 270px;
  left: calc(50% - 357px + 0px);
  top: calc(50% - 135px + -104px);
  transform: translateZ(0px) rotateX(86deg) rotateY(-1deg);
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(200,80,198,0.6) 0%, transparent 70%);
  filter: blur(18px);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.chest-glow-2 { /* Cross glow 2 */
  position: absolute;
  width: 714px; height: 270px;
  left: calc(50% - 357px + 0px);
  top: calc(50% - 135px + 0px);
  transform: translateZ(0px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(25deg);
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(200,80,198,0.6) 0%, transparent 70%);
  filter: blur(18px);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.chest-glow-3 { /* Cross glow 3 */
  position: absolute;
  width: 714px; height: 270px;
  left: calc(50% - 357px + 0px);
  top: calc(50% - 135px + 0px);
  transform: translateZ(0px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(-23deg);
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(200,80,198,0.6) 0%, transparent 70%);
  filter: blur(18px);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.chest-glow-4 { /* Item.glow */
  position: absolute;
  width: 714px; height: 270px;
  left: calc(50% - 357px + 0px);
  top: calc(50% - 135px + 0px);
  transform: translateZ(0px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(68deg);
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(255,200,80,0.05) 0%, transparent 70%);
  filter: blur(18px);
  pointer-events: none;
}
/* Glow child: "🎒" */
.chest-glow-child-4 {
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%; top: 50%;
  pointer-events: none;
  line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap;
  transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.33,1,0.68,1);
  text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(255,200,80,0.5);
  font-size: 0px;
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translate(-50%,-50%) translateY(-50px) translateZ(0px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(68deg);
}
.box3d-wrap.chest-variant.hovered .chest-glow-child-4 {
  font-size: 98px;
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translate(-50%,-50%) translateY(-39px) translateZ(9px) rotateX(-4deg) rotateY(23deg);
}
.box3d-wrap.chest-variant.opened .chest-glow-child-4 {
  font-size: 120px;
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translate(-50%,-50%) translateY(-139px) translateZ(30px) rotateX(6deg) rotateY(-16deg);
}


/* === PHASE ANIMATIONS (applied to wrapper) === */
/* Phase 1: squish:4% */
/* Phase 2: squish:8%, glow */
/* Phase 3: poke:7%, glow */
